# RAWR – Recruitment AI Workforce Revolution GmbH

RAWR is presented as an AI enablement and HR transformation partner for companies that want to introduce AI in recruiting, HR operations and people operations responsibly.

## Core Topics

- AI enablement for HR and People Operations
- GDPR-oriented AI workflows
- Recruiting automation and prompt libraries
- HR AI readiness audits
- Responsible AI, governance and human-in-the-loop processes
- Business process automation for HR teams

## Important Pages

- Home: https://rawr.solutions/
- Company and leadership team: https://rawr.solutions/unternehmen
- Services: https://rawr.solutions/leistungen
- Case studies: https://rawr.solutions/case-studies
- References: https://rawr.solutions/referenzen
- Licences: https://rawr.solutions/lizenzen
- Q&A: https://rawr.solutions/fragen
- Contact: https://rawr.solutions/kontakt
- Legal notice: https://rawr.solutions/impressum

## Suggested Summary

RAWR helps HR teams introduce AI in a structured, GDPR-oriented and practical way, combining strategy, workshops, automation, compliance and enablement.

## Contact

Website: https://rawr.solutions/
Email: hello@rawr.de

## Note

The legal notice states that the website is a student project. Verify legal and business details before citing the company as an active commercial provider.
